stem: A scatterplot in the xy-plane shows 6 data points trending up from left to right, with a line of best fit passing through the approximate coordinates (0, 0.3) and (5, 3). Which of the following is closest to the slope of the line of best fit?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. Slope = (3 − 0.3) / (5 − 0) = 2.7 / 5 = 0.54.

Choices A and C are negative, inconsistent with an upward trend. Choice D is the result of dividing 5/2.7 incorrectly inverted.
